title: scirpus × contortus
intro: Scirpus × contortus, also known as purple needlegrass or contorted bulrush, is a hybrid plant species in the sedge family that is commonly found in wet environments. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its high concentration of essential oils. The health benefits of Scirpus × contortus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal benefits, and can also be used topically in ointments and salves.
